name: oriflux
description: Read-only web + product + API analytics from your Oriflux instance, inside Claude Desktop.
long_description:
Oriflux by Sponge Theory is a self-hosted, cookieless, multi-tenant analytics platform unifying web analytics + product analytics + API analytics. This extension connects Claude Desktop to your own Oriflux instance's read-only MCP endpoint (streamable HTTP at /mcp), authenticated with a read-scoped API key.

Every tool is the same REST endpoint the Oriflux dashboard uses, compiled through Oriflux's typed metric registry, so answers never drift from the UI.

**Read-only tools:**
- list_projects — the products/properties visible to your key's org
- get_overview — visitors, pageviews, sessions, bounce rate, session duration, API requests, error rates, p95
- query_metrics — the typed query object (metric, dimensions, filters, granularity, period, compare_to); returns rows and the executed SQL
- get_geo_breakdown — geographic distribution (country / region / city)
- get_api_health — request volume, 4xx/5xx rates, p50/p95/p99 latency, top endpoints

No secret is baked into this bundle: your instance URL and read key are entered in Claude Desktop's extension configuration and sent only to your own instance over HTTPS.

base_url.title: Oriflux API base URL
base_url.description: Base URL of your Oriflux API instance (cloud or self-host), without /mcp — e.g. https://api.oriflux.sponge-theory.dev. Leave the default unless you self-host or the hosted instance is not yet live.

api_key.title: Oriflux read key (ofx_read_…)
api_key.description: A read-scoped Oriflux API key (ofx_read_…), issued per organization in the Oriflux dashboard. Read keys can only query analytics — they cannot write. Shown once at creation.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List the projects (products) visible to the read key's organization

tools.name: get_overview
tools.description: Headline traffic + API numbers for a project over a period (visitors, pageviews, sessions, bounce rate, session duration, API requests, error rates, p95)

tools.name: query_metrics
tools.description: Run a typed metric query (metric, dimensions, filters, granularity, period, compare_to); returns rows and the executed SQL

tools.name: get_geo_breakdown
tools.description: Geographic distribution for a project (country / region / city) for a metric over a period

tools.name: get_api_health
tools.description: API request volume, 4xx/5xx rates, p50/p95/p99 latency and top endpoints for a project over a period
